import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            count = count + 1
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
